name: Chili Brunch (Inn)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all of the ingredients together.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
3. Refrigerate overnight if desired.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 45 minutes.
5. Serve with a tablespoon of mild salsa and sour cream on top.
